---
title: "TODO"
author: "Chris Kypridemos"
date: "5/25/2020"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# transition
- Fix logic to include exposure files to parf generation when required
- Fix logic to include synthpop files to parf generation when required
- make sure qs2 in docker is multithreaded ( R -q -e "install.packages(
    \"qs2\",
    type = \"source\",
    lib = \"/usr/lib64/R/library\",
    repos = \"https://cloud.r-project.org\",
    configure.args = \"--with-TBB --with-simd=AVX2\"
  )")
